tasks.subject: Plan Task 1: CardSignals helper and seed shape
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Define the per-card signal payload shape (stale, speedMode, airflowMode, lastPollAge, sensorsAlert) once, used by both initial render and runtime push.

**Files:**
- Modify: cmd/breezyd/ui/view.go
- Test: cmd/breezyd/ui/templates/render_test.go

**Verify:** `go test ./cmd/breezyd/ui/...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/breezyd/ui/view.go", "cmd/breezyd/ui/templates/render_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./cmd/breezyd/ui/...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["CardSignals struct defined", "CardSignalsFor populates from DeviceView", "MarshalCardSignals returns JSON bytes", "Test asserts JSON shape with all 5 fields"]}
```

tasks.subject: Plan Task 2: Card-outer reactive shell
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire card outer's class="stale", data-speed-mode, data-airflow-mode, "X ago" stale row, and seed signal payload to use new CardSignals shape.

**Files:**
- Modify: cmd/breezyd/ui/templates/device_card.templ
- Test: cmd/breezyd/ui/templates/render_test.go

**Verify:** `just generate && go test ./cmd/breezyd/ui/templates/ -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/breezyd/ui/templates/device_card.templ", "cmd/breezyd/ui/templates/render_test.go", "cmd/breezyd/ui/templates/testdata/"], "verifyCommand": "just generate && go test ./cmd/breezyd/ui/templates/ -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["data-class:stale binding present", "data-attr:data-speed-mode binding present", "data-attr:data-airflow-mode binding present", "Stale row uses data-show + data-text", "data-signals JSON includes 5 CardSignals fields", "InfoDetails extracted and capitalized"]}
```

tasks.subject: Plan Task 3: data-block, data-sensor-cell, data-edit markers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Tag every patchable element with markers needed for per-block selectors and edit-mode exclusion.

**Files:** energy_block.templ, sensors_block.templ, sensor_threshold.templ, schedule_block.templ, controls_block.templ, render_test.go

**Verify:** `just generate && go test ./cmd/breezyd/ui/templates/ -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/breezyd/ui/templates/energy_block.templ", "cmd/breezyd/ui/templates/sensors_block.templ", "cmd/breezyd/ui/templates/sensor_threshold.templ", "cmd/breezyd/ui/templates/schedule_block.templ", "cmd/breezyd/ui/templates/controls_block.templ", "cmd/breezyd/ui/templates/render_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "just generate && go test ./cmd/breezyd/ui/templates/ -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["All 5 blocks carry data-block markers", "12 sensor cells have data-sensor-cell", "Edit variants carry data-edit", "Controls block reactive data-edit on $editor signal", "Sensors block uses data-class:alert reactive instead of static class"]}
```

tasks.subject: Plan Task 4: PushHub structured event (Signals + Blocks)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Transform PushHub to render and queue a structured PushEvent carrying signals JSON + list of (selector, html) block patches.

**Verify:** `just generate && go test ./cmd/breezyd/ -v && go build ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/breezyd/push_hub.go", "cmd/breezyd/push_render.go", "cmd/breezyd/main.go", "cmd/breezyd/ui_view.go", "cmd/breezyd/ui/format.go", "cmd/breezyd/ui/templates/sensors_block.templ", "cmd/breezyd/ui/templates/controls_block.templ", "cmd/breezyd/ui/templates/device_card.templ", "cmd/breezyd/push_hub_test.go", "cmd/breezyd/handlers_ui_sse_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "just generate && go test ./cmd/breezyd/ -v && go build ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["PushEvent + BlockPatch types defined", "buildPushEvent produces 16 block patches + signals JSON", "Templ symbols capitalized for cross-package use", "Format helpers exported", "main.go wires new closure", "Tests updated and pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Plan Task 5: SSE handler — signals + per-block + Last-Event-ID
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Transform getUISSE to detect cold-load vs reconnect via Last-Event-ID, and emit one datastar-patch-signals + N datastar-patch-elements per push event.

**Verify:** `go test ./cmd/breezyd/ -run GetUISSE -v && go test ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/breezyd/handlers_ui_sse.go", "cmd/breezyd/handlers_ui_sse_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./cmd/breezyd/ -run GetUISSE -v && go test ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Cold load uses mode=append", "Reconnect uses mode=outer", "Push event emits PatchSignals + N PatchElements", "Each event carries event ID", "All SSE tests pass", "Manual smoke confirms editor preservation"]}
```

tasks.subject: Plan Task 6: Playwright e2e editor preservation tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pin acceptance criteria with browser-driven tests for schedule, threshold, preset editors plus stale-via-signal.

**Verify:** `just test-ui`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/ui/dashboard.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "just test-ui", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Schedule preservation test passes", "Threshold preservation test passes", "Preset slider preservation test passes", "Stale-via-signal test passes (no card re-render)", "No new flakes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Plan Task 7: CHANGELOG + final verification
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Document the architectural change in CHANGELOG and run the full pre-push gate; open and auto-merge PR.

**Verify:** `just check-all`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["CHANGELOG.md"], "verifyCommand": "just check-all", "acceptanceCriteria": ["CHANGELOG updated", "just check-all green", "Manual smoke confirms acceptance criteria", "PR opened and auto-merge enabled"]}
```
